== Notes for [[Item:Q109881|Q109881]] ==

Source 1:

Source 2: http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Mutawakkil

----

10th Abbasid Caliph - r.10 August 847 – 11 December 861 - Son of Al-Mu'tasim and Shuja, probably a Turkish concubine from Khawarizm

Happening during his reign: End of official support for Mu'tazilism, abolition of the miḥnah (848/851). Return to Sunni orthodoxy.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
